caption: A man with a mustache, wearing a white shirt and a dark red vest, is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands in front of a vehicle. He is positioned in the center of the shot, with a microphone labeled "ANI" held close to him. Throughout the sequence, various news graphics and portraits of other individuals appear on the screen. The top headers read "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "NEWS 18 इंडिया". Banners at the bottom transition from "शपथ लेने के बाद नीतीश कुमार का बयान" to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and finally "नीतीश कुमार: पहले भी NC". Small portraits on the sides are labeled with names and titles such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "सप्रत चौधरी", and "विजय चौधरी". The time "10:04 PM" and the logo "MAHADESH मंत्री की मान्यता" are consistently visible in the bottom right corner across the frames.
